| `type` | `TypeSynthesisGoal` | Path1HandleResolver |  |  |  | pure-accessor bundle (default) |
| `type` | `TypeSynthesisResult` | Path1HandleResolver |  |  |  | pure-accessor bundle (default) |
| `type` | `VarianceAnnotation` | Skip |  |  |  | VarianceAnnotation is an enum class or Primitives |
| `type` | `VersalDeformation` | Path1HandleResolver |  |  |  | pure-accessor bundle (default) |
| `type` | `WittLift` | Path1HandleResolver |  |  |  | pure-accessor bundle (default) |
| `u` | `Element` | Path1HandleResolver |  |  |  | pure-accessor bundle (default) |
